methods.name: FixedMap-NDT+ScanContext
methods.note: Fixed-map NDT: target map built once from GT/reference poses (stride=10, map_points=22000). Seed source=scan_context, accepted=23/107, rejected=84, seed fallbacks=88. ScanContext hits=19/107, top_k=10, NDT candidates evaluated=19, mean distance=0.0754.
